_readme: pipeline v7 — whisper 실측+간격배분+감쇠보정, QA 통과분
title: I'll just look around

sentences.en: ★ Um, can I help you at all?
★ No, thanks. I'll just... look around.
Uh, that book's really not great. Just in case, you know, browsing turned to buying. You'd be wasting your money.
sentences.ko: 저, 그 책은 별로예요. 혹시 구경이 구매로 이어질까 봐요. 돈 낭비하시는 거예요.

sentences.en: ★ But if it's Turkey you're interested in, um, this one, on the other hand, is very good.
sentences.ko: ★ 그런데 튀르키예에 관심 있으신 거면, 반면에 이 책은 아주 좋아요.
